title: LAWNGTLAIAH CM SPECIAL PACKAGE PHASE-II HNUAIA PROGRESS PARTNERS - TE TAN 'ORIENTATION TRAINING'  NEI
content:
705/2026-2027

Lawngtlai 26th May, 2026:Vawiin khan DC Office Chamber-ah 'CM Special Package phase II' hnuaia Progress Partners- te tan 'Orientation Training' neih a ni a, Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan hmanpuiin, Pi Margaret J. Vanlalremmawii, SDO (S) chuan hun a kaihruai.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kalkhawmte hnenah lawmna thu sawiin Banakaih Kaih hnuaia 'CM Special Package' chu mi tumruh leh mahni kutkea dinchhuah tum te tan chuan Scheme tha tak a ni, a ti a. A thlawna pawisa dawngtu ni mai lo a, mahni dinchhuah nan a hmang turin a fuih a. A bik takin Progress Partners- te chu sawrkarin Bana a Kaih reng ngai lo a, mahnia intungnung leh dingchhuak zui thei tura thahnem ngai taka thawk turin a chah a. Progress Partners- te chu an pawisa dawn chhan ang taka hmanga thawk tur leh 'CM Special Package' hmang tha ber ni tura chahin, Line Department - te pawh thahnem ngai taka endik zui fo thin turin a chah nghal bawk.

Pi Margaret J. Vanlalremmawii SDO (S) chuan Progress Partners- te pawimawhna sawiin, hlawhtlinna chang tura theihtawp chhuah turin a fuih a. Sum leh pai an hmuhna chuan hriaa, a nihna ang taka hmang tur leh theihtawp chhuaha an dinhmun siam that nan hmang turin a chah a ni.

He hunah hian Dr. Charlie Chawngthu, District AH& Very Officer -chuan 'Bana Kaih Scheme' nihphung tlangpuite, Entrepreneurship leh Business Management - chungchangah te training a pe a, zawhna leh chhanna hun hman nghal a ni.

Vawiina Orientation Training- ah hian AH & Vety Department hnuaia  Progress Partners- mi 6 - an tel thei a. Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan 'Certificate' leh 'Placard'  hlanna nei nghalin,  Pu Lalhruaizela, SDC chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar.

Attachment

title: SIR 2026 ATAN SAITUAL, NGOPA LEH PHULLENAH TE TRAINING BUATSAIH A NI
content:
704/2026-2027

Saitual, the 26th May, 2026:Vawiin khan Electoral Roll-a inthun tharna Special Intensive Revision of Photo Electoral 2026 atan Saitual District-a BLO, Addl. BLO leh BLO Supervisors te chuan DC Conference Hall, Saitual, BDO Conference Hall, Ngopa leh BDO Conference Hall, Phullen-ah training an nei a ni.

Saitualah hian BLO- 58, Addl. BLO- 39, BLO Supervisor- 10, a vaiin mi 107 tan DC Conference Hall-ah training neih a ni a, Pi Mary L. Rodinpuii, Election Officer chuan inlawmna thu sawiin, zawhna leh chhanna hun a hmanpui bawk a ni. Master trainer hi Pu J. Lalawmpuia, SDC Saitual & AERO, 9-Ṭawi a ni.

Ngopaah hian BDO Conference Hall-ah master trainer Pu Samuel Malsawmzuala, BDO Ngopa & AERO, 21- Lengteng chuan BLO-14, Addl. BLO-12, BLO Supervisors-4, a vaiin mi 30 tan training a pe a ni. Phullenah hian BDO Conference Hall-ah master trainer Pu J. Lalhmahruaia, BDO Phullen & AERO, 8-Chalfilh chuan BLO-16, Addl. BLO-13, BLO supervisors-3, an vaiin mi 32 hnenah training a pe a ni. Vawiinah hian master trainers te hian SIR 2026 kalpui dan tur te leh BLO, Addl. BLO leh BLO supervisor te hna leh mawhphurna hrang hrang te an zirtir a ni.

Attachment

title: Two-day training programme for BLO supervisors, BLOs & Asst BLOs commenced at Siaha
content:
110/2026-2027

Siaha the 26th May 2026:A two-day training for BLO Supervisors, Booth Level Officers, and Asst Booth Level Officers for the ongoing Special Intensive Revision (SIR) conducted by the Election Commission of India (ECI) commenced today at the DRDO Conference Hall. The training was chaired by Election Officer Pu Vabeimozachhi Chozah.

Pu M Misael, Project Director, DRDO and ERO for 40 Palak (ST) AC, encouraged the participants to take the training seriously and to put in their best efforts to ensure a clean and accurate electoral roll. He stated that in a democratic country, elections are held regularly, and even for those already familiar with the process, it is necessary to be updated and refreshed constantly, making such training very important. He reminded the attendees that they are on deputation from the ECI and encouraged them to give their best and fulfill their responsibilities diligently.

Pu Abraham Beirazi Khithie, Additional Deputy Commissioner and ERO for 39-Saiha (ST) AC, also addressed the gathering. He said that without a clean electoral roll, free and fair elections cannot be held. He requested the officials to carry out their duties throughly to ensure a clean electoral process since elections are the most important aspect of a democracy. He noted that the responsibility for the special drive to revise the electoral roll, SIR 2026, falls on each individual present, and urged them to ensure that eligible names are included while ineligible names are deleted so that every citizen’s right to elect their preferred representatives in the governance of the country is safeguarded. He also advised all officials with different responsibilities to coordinate well and not hesitate to seek clarification from others if needed. He wished the participants a fruitful training and extended his best wishes.

Pi Zorinsangi, AERO 39-Saiha (ST) AC, delivered a lecture on the topic “Overview of SIR 2026.” Pi Lalhlimpui Pachuau, AERO 40-Palak (ST) AC, also gave a lecture on “Roles and Responsibilities of BLO and Assistant BLO.” The training concluded with a doubt clearing session and distribution of materials and important documents for the attendees.

Attachment

title: SIR 2026 kal mekah BLO supervisor, BLO leh Asst BLO te tan Siaha-ah ni 2 awh tur training buatsaih
content:
703/2026-2027

Siaha the 26th May 2026:Election Commission of India (ECI) buatsaih Special Intensive Revision (SIR) kalpui mek chungchangah vawiin khan BLO Supervisors, Booth Level Officers leh Asst Booth Level Officer te tan ni-hnih awh tur training chu Election Officer Pu Vabeimozachhi Chozah kaihhruainain DRDO conference Hall-ah ṭan a ni.

Vawiin training-ah hian ERO, 40-Palak (ST) AC, DRDO a Project Director ni bawk Pu M Misael chuan training chu ngai pawimawha roll felfai leh thianghlim a awm theih nan theihtawp chhuah turin a chah. Democracy ramah chuan election (inthlanna) a awm reng dawn a, a hre sa tan pawhin inhrilhhriat nawn fo a, intuaithar reng ngai a nih avangin training chu a pawimawh hle a ti. Kalkhawmte chu ECI aikal (deputation) an ni tih inhriaa theihtawp chhuah turin leh an mawhphurhna tha taka hlen chhuak turin a chah a ni.

Pu Abraham Beirazi Khithie, ERO, 39-Saiha (ST) AC pawhin thu sawiin electoral roll thianghlim a awm loh chuan inthlanna thianghlim a awm thei lo a, democracy rama pawimawh ber inthlanna felfai a awm theih nan training tura kalkhawmte chu an mawhphurhna tha taka hlen turin a chah. E roll siam that runpui SIR 2026 a mawhphurhna pawimawh tak an ko a a tla chu a chhuanawm a, mi tinin ram rorelnaa an duhzawng hruaitu an thlan theihna tura an dikna chanvo humhalh a nih theih nan roll ah thun tur dik tak thun a, paih ngai te paih an nih theih nan tan la turin a fuih a ni. Mawhphurhna hrang hrang nei te thawhhona tha tak nei turin leh hriatchian loh an neih chuan midang zawt hreh lo turin a chah a, training hlawkthlak tak nei turin duhsakna a hlan nghal bawk a ni.

Pi Zorinsangi, AERO 39-Saiha (ST) AC chuan overview of SIR 2026 tih thupui hmangin zirtirna a pe a, Pi Lalhlimpui Pachuau, AERO 40- Palak (ST )AC pawhin roles and responsibilities of BLO tih thupui hmangin zirtirna a pe bawk. Kalkhawmte nen zawhna leh chhanna hun hman niin SIR 2026 kalpuina tura lehkha pawimawh hrang hrang sem nghal a ni.

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT CONDUCTS TRAINING FOR BLOs, ADDITIONAL BLOs AND SUPERVISORS FOR SIR 2026
content:
109/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 26th May 2026:As part of the preparations for the conduct of the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) 2026, training for BLOs, Additional BLOs and Supervisors was held today at the DC Conference Hall. The programme was attended by Lawngtlai District Election Officer (DEO), Shri Donny Lalruatsanga.

Addressing the participants, Shri Donny Lalruatsanga expressed appreciation to all election officials for their sincere and dedicated service in carrying out election-related duties. He stated that the role of BLOs, Additional BLOs and Supervisors is extremely important in ensuring a clean, accurate and error-free Electoral Roll, and urged them to carry out their responsibilities with utmost sincerity and dedication. He emphasized that all eligible Indian citizens who have attained 18 years of age must be included in the Electoral Roll, while at the same time ensuring that ineligible names are not wrongly included. Hence, he stressed the need for utmost caution and careful verification.

The DEO further acknowledged the geographical challenges of Lawngtlai District, where communication and transportation are often difficult, but stressed that maintaining a proper and accurate Electoral Roll remains essential. He therefore encouraged all BLOs, Additional BLOs and Supervisors to work diligently and wholeheartedly.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga informed that under SIR 2026, a fresh Electoral Roll will be prepared, and BLOs will undertake house-to-house visits for enumeration and collection of voter details such as names, age and other particulars. He stated that the work must be carried out carefully, systematically and transparently. Since the Draft Roll will first be prepared using the Enumeration Forms, he emphasized the importance of timely distribution and collection of the forms by BLOs. He also instructed that house visits should be conducted at least three times as mandated under the rules.The DEO further urged all BLOs, Additional BLOs and Supervisors to extend full cooperation with the DEO Office and wished them success in the training programme.

Shri Collin Hlychho, Election Officer, delivered a presentation on the overall concept and implementation process of SIR 2026. He highlighted that a free and fair election depends first and foremost on an accurate and error-free Electoral Roll, and that much of this responsibility rests upon the BLOs, Additional BLOs and Supervisors. He urged the participants to take the training seriously and attend it with sincerity and attentiveness.

Training sessions on important aspects of SIR 2026 for BLOs, Additional BLOs and Supervisors were conducted simultaneously at three locations — DC Conference Hall, Lawngtlai; BDO Conference Hall, Chawngte; and VC House, South Lungpher. The training was imparted by District Master Trainers Shri Lalnunpuia Renthlei (AERO), Shri Thomas Maratha Hlychho (AERO) and Shri R. Vanlalruata (AERO).

Today's training programme was attended by  BLOs, Additional BLOs and Supervisors from across Lawngtlai District and the programme concluded with a vote of thanks delivered by Shri  Collin Hlychho, Election Officer.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT- A SIR 2026 KALPUI TURAH BLO, ADDL. BLO LEH SUPERVISOR - TE TAN TRAINING NEI
content:
702/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 26th May 2026 :Special Intensive Revision ( SIR) 2026 kalpui tura inbuatsaihna kal zelah vawiin khan BLO, Addl. BLO leh Supervisor - te tan DC Conference Hall- ah 'Training' neih a ni a. Lawngtlai District Election Officer (DEO) Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan a hmanpui.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kalkhawmte chungah lawmthu a sawi a. SIR 2026 kalpui turin Election Official - te thahnemngai takin an thawk thin tih tarlangin, an thawhrimna a fak awm hle a ti a. Electoral Roll- tha, felfai leh thianghlim nei turin BLO, Additional BLO leh Supervisor - te an pawimawh hle tih tarlangin, an mawhphurhna hriaa theihtawp chhuah turin a chah a. India khua leh tui dik tak, kum 18 tling chinte an chuang ngei ngei tur a ni tih sawiin, chutih rualin a chuanglo tur te an chuan palh a hlauhawm hle a, fimkhur a tul hle a ni, a ti. A bik takin Lawngtlai District- chu lianin, inkalpawh leh inbuakpawh pawh a harsa thin hle tih a hriatthiam thu tarlangin chutih rualin E/Roll felfai neih a tul hle tiin, BLO, Addl. BLO leh Supervisor - te thahnem ngai taka thawk turin a chah a ni.

DEO chuan SIR 2026 - ah Electoral Roll- thar hlak siam a ni dawn a, BLO- te In tina kala (house-to-house visit), voter-te hming, kum, leh nihnate ziah luh thar hna (enumeration), an kalpui dawn tih tarlangin langtlang tak leh fimkhur taka hnathawh pawh a tul dawn hle a ti a. Enumeration Form hmanga Draft Roll siam phawt tur a nih angin, BLO- te chu Enumeration Form- sem chhuah leh lakkhawm kawngah a hun takah engkim tih a tul dawn tih sawiin, dan in a phut anga vawi 3 In tina kal ngei ngei turin a chah a. Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan BLO, Addl. BLO leh Supervisor - te theihtawp chhuah tur leh DEO Office thawhpui tlat tura sawmin, tha taka training - nei turin duhsakna a hlan nghal bawk.

Pu Collin Hlychho Election Officer chuan training SIR 2026 nihphung tlangpui leh kalpui a nih dan tur sawizauna a nei a. Inthlanna dik leh felfai awm tur chuan E/ Roll- dik leh felfai neih phawt a tul thu tarlangin, hemiah hian BLO, Addl. BLO leh Supervisor - te kutah thui tak a innghat tih a sawi a. Training - koh a nihna ngaipawimawha, tha leh uluk taka Training- nei turin a sawm nghal a ni.

SIR 2026 chungchanga BLO, Addl. BLO leh Supervisor - te hriattur pawimawh inzirtirna hi hmun thum- DC Conference Hall, Lawngtlai; BDO Conference Hall Chawngte leh VC House, South Lungpher ah te neih a ni a. District Master Trainer - pathum Pu Lalnunpuia Renthlei, (AERO), Pu Thomas Maratha Hlychho (AERO) leh Pu R. Vanlalruata (AERO) ten training - hi an pe a ni.

Vawiin hun hmannaah hian Lawngtlai District - a BLO, Addl. BLO leh Supervisor - te an tel kim tha hle a, Pu Collin Hlychho,  Election Officer,  chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar.

Attachment

title: CHIEF MINISTER-IN VIGILANCE DEPARTMENT BUATSAIH WORKSHOP FOR DISCIPLINARY AUTHORITIES A TELPUI
content:
701/2026-2027

Aizawl the 26th May 2026:Vawiin khan Vigilance Department ten Department hrang hranga disciplinary authority-te tan ATI Auditorium-ah Workshop for Disciplinary Authority a buatsaih a, Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chuan a hawnna inkhawm a telpui.

Thu sawiin Chief Minister chuan, sorkar hnathawktu tha, hun vawng dik, inpe zo neih kan duh a, sorkarna kan chan rualin chutiang hmalakna chu kan kalpui nghal a. Chhawrtlak lohte indapchhuak turin Service Review Committee din vek turin kan ti a, a tul phei chuan special pension pawh pek mai ni se kan ti a. A scheme pawh kan siam a ni. Chung zawng zawng chu ram tana hna tha zawk thawh kan duh vang a ni.

Vawiina Disciplinary Authority-te tana Workshop hi Mizorama hetiang workshop kan neih hmasak ber niin ka hria a. He workshop hian hnathawk tha lo leh chhawrtlak lohte chunga dan anga hmalak kawngah min tichak se, sorkar hnathawk tha zawk nei turin min pui se kan duh a ni. Disciplinary authority ten in mawhphurhnate, in hnathawh chhan leh in thawh dan turte hre chiang ula, hlawk takin hun lo hmang ang che u.

Enquiry Officer ten thudik chauh innghahchhanah hmang thin ila, thlei bik nei lovin, tehna dik tak chauh hmang ang u. Tin, Inquiry Officer ruat kawngah pawh kan fimkhur thin dawn nia. Sorkar chuan kan Inquiry Officer te, Presenting Officer te lawmman (honorarium) hi sorkar laipui rate angin kan tisang a. Hei hian an hnathawh kan ngaihhlutzia a tilang a ni.

Vigilance Department Quarterly Report hnuhnung ber, March 2026 -a a lan danin department thenkhatten Vigilance Case kan neih nual laiin Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Animal Husbandry & Veterinary, Art and Culture, Environment and Forests, Law and Judicial, Tourism leh department dangten NIL report an nei a. An chungah lawmthu ka sawi a. Case nei department te pawh lo tang thar a, case nei lo tura inbuatsaih vek turin ka ngen che u a ni, a ti.

Chief Minister hian Workshop buatsaihtu Vigilance Department chungah lawmthu a sawi bawk a ni.

A hawnna inkhawm hi Dr. YLN Reddy, IAS, Secretary, Vigilance chuan kaihruaiin kalkhawmte lawmna thu a sawi a. Pu Sudhir Kumar, IAS, Acting Chief Secretary & Chief Vigilance Officer chuan sawi hawnna (keynote address) a nei a. A hawnna inkhawm neih zawh hian Disciplinary Authorities kal khawmte hian an mawhphurhna leh hnathawh dan tur zirhona an nei zui a ni.

title: Hnahthialah UD&PA Cleanliness Drive pualin Khelo India Centre Naupangte'n HDFA Turf Ground tifai
content:
700/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 26thMay, 2026:UD&PA hmalakna hnuaia Cleanliness Drive chu Hnahthial District-ah kalpui chhunzawm zel niin tukin khan District Urban Development Officer (DUDO), Pi Christina Lalnunfeli kaihhruaiin Khelo India Centre (KIC) naupangte leh HDFA hruaitute chuan HDFA Turf Ground leh a chhehvel tihfai hnatlang an nei.

DUDO chuan faina leh hriselna chu thil kalkawp leh inthlunzawm tlat a nih avangin kan taksa insawizawina hmunte chu fai taka vawng thin turin naupangte chu a chah a. HDFA turf ground hmang thin zawng zawngte pawh an hnawmhnawkte hnutchhiah mai mai lo tur a ngenin HDFA hruaitute chu he field hmang ngun ber an nihna angin a tihfai kawngah tan lo la lehzual turin a hrilh a ni.

DUDO hmalaknain Hnahthial District hmun hrang hrang tihfai leh chei that hnatlang chu kalpui mek a ni a. Hnahthial chu District fai leh mawi ber a nih theih nan DUDO chuan theihtawp an chhuah zel tur thu sawiin Hnahthial mipui zawng zawngte chu thawhpuiah a sawm nghal a ni.

Attachment
